issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error scenarios or edge cases.

scenarios.name: migrate flake8+black+isort to Ruff with pre-commit
scenarios.rationale: Baseline tends to use the older [tool.ruff] top-level select rather than the [tool.ruff.lint] namespace and may skip ruff-format, whereas treatment matches the documented config and the ruff-pre-commit repo wiring with both ruff (--fix) and ruff-format hooks.

scenarios.name: Ruff in CI with PR annotations
scenarios.rationale: Baseline knows ruff check and ruff format --check but typically omits the --output-format=github flag that produces PR-annotated failures; treatment uses the exact CI snippet from the skill.
